overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game depicting a character in heavy winter gear walking through a blizzard in a mountainous wilderness. The character follows a snow-covered trail alongside a frozen river as daylight fades into deep night, eventually encountering a horse standing in the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail beside frozen river

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow along the riverbank, leaving footprints in the fresh powder

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow lining the left side of the trail
partially frozen waterway running parallel to the path on the left
steep hillside blanketed in white snow rising on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy wilderness trail during a heavy blizzard. Snow-covered pine trees line the left side while a frozen river flows parallel to the path. The visibility is limited by falling snow, and the landscape is dominated by white snow and dark green trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky snow valley with scattered boulders

events.description: ambient light fades significantly to deep blue twilight as night falls and the storm intensifies

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail as darkness descends, navigating around snow-covered rocks

entered.detail: large dark rocks protruding from the snow on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: As night approaches, the character moves through a more open valley where large boulders emerge from the snow on the right. The pine trees recede into the distance, and the frozen river appears narrower and further to the left. The lighting shifts to a deep blue twilight, reducing visibility.

events.description: a white horse emerges from the darkness ahead, standing motionless on the trail

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a horse standing in the path, continuing through the deep snow in near-total darkness

notable_agents.action: standing still in the snow as the character approaches, then remaining stationary as the character passes by

entered.detail: low snow-laden shrubs appearing on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: In the darkness of night, the character continues through the blizzard with very limited visibility. A white horse stands ahead on the path, creating a stark silhouette against the snow. The character passes the stationary horse as low bushes appear on the right, and the frozen river is now visible only as a dark line in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy wilderness that transitions from a blinding daytime blizzard into the deep darkness of night. It begins with the character walking along a trail lined with snow-covered pine trees and a parallel frozen river, where visibility is heavily obscured by falling snow. As the character moves into a more open valley, the pine trees recede and large boulders emerge from the snow on the right while the lighting shifts into a deep blue twilight. The scene then descends into the total darkness of night, reducing the frozen river to a faint dark line in the distance. Finally, the camera approaches a white horse standing as a stark silhouette on the path, passing the stationary animal as low bushes appear along the roadside.
